---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new level, shortcut, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see

A clear description of the idea.

## Why

What problem does it solve, or how does it improve learning?

## tmux accuracy

If this adds or changes a shortcut, cite the tmux behavior (e.g. `man tmux`
reference or the default key it maps to). Remember: tmux keybindings are the
same on every OS.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps.
